titleStmt.title: SII 38.495: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 495. (A.R. No. 495 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravattin Rājarāja III Year: 18 Karkaṭaka, ba. di. 1, Sunday, Aviṭṭam = 23rd July 1233 A.D. but the day was Sunday.

summary.p: Records the sale of land called Nakkaṉpāḍi, in Ūṟṟattūr, which occupied half of the village [Ūṟṟattūr] in Vaḍa[kaṟai] Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain Araiyaṉ Mallaṉ Śīyaṉ alias Brahmādarāya Muttaraiyaṉ of Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu in vaḍa-karai Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, to an agambaḍiyār called Kuṟukkai Mātuyaramtīttāṉ Kumārapāla, belonging to Neṟkuḷam of the same nāḍu. The land including house site, dry and wet land, grazing ground, garden and ūr-nattam, but excluding the kāṇi land of Nakkaṉpāḍi-uḍaiyārgaḷ, was sold for 4000 aṉṟāḍu naṟkāśu. Mallaṉ Śīyaṉ alias Brāhmadarāyaṉ Muttaraiyaṉ received the amount and accordingly gave the sale deed to the buyer.

Kuriyāmaṅgalam-uḍaiyān Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ ūṟaiyāṇḍān Nārppeteṇṇāyira Piṟiyaṉ, the accountant of the uḍaiyār Tūmāmaṇi-nāyanār temple, wrote the document at the instance of Mallaṉ Śīyaṉ alias Brahamādarayāṉ the seller of the land. Both of them and several others figure as signatories of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8 vatu kaṟkaṭakaṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu piratamaiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarairājārā
ja vaḷaṉāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu Araiyaṉ mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa piramātirāya muttaraiyaṉen Innāṭṭu neṟkuḷattilirukkum Akampaṭiyāril kuṟukkai mātuyaramtittāṉ kumarapā
laṟku nilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu nāṉ Ivaṟku viṟkiṉṟa Innāṭṭu nakkanpāṭikku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai pulivāvai Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai moṭṭa
ṅkūṭal Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai neṟkuḷattu Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūṟṟattūr Ellaikku teṟkum Āka yicainta perunāṉkellai Uḷ naṭuvuḷ
paṭṭa Ūrnattamum naṉceypuṉcey Ērikuḷam nir koṭṭamum Uḷpaṭṭa nakkaṉpāṭi Uṭaiyārkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭārkaḷ kāṇi Oṉṟu pāti nikki Eṉ Aracu 4 5 nāṉ vilai [1/2] kāṇi
Iṭaiye nāṉ nilamum Uḷpaṭṭa Ūraṭaṅkalil Oṉṟu pāti Ivaṟku nāṉ Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟkācu
4000 Ikkācunālāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇaicaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ kuṟukkai mātuyarantittāṉ kumarapālaṉukku
mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa piramātārāya muttaraiyaneṉ Inta nakkaṉpāṭi naṉcey puṉcey Ūr nattamum kuḷamuṅkoṭṭamum maṉṟum kaṉṟum nilapāḻum maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭanavum Uḷpaṭa na
Oṉṟu pāti nikki nikki ni pātikkum Ikkācu nālāyiramume vilaiyāvatākavu Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷc celavolaiyāvatākavum I
tu vallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutipporuḷc celavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallātākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭukkuṭu
tteṉ kuṟukkai mātuyaran tittāṉ kumarapālaṟku mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa piramātarāyamuttaraiyaṉeṉ Ivaṉ veṇumeṉṟa pote Inta nakkanpāṭi Ūrāṭaṅkalil Oṉṟu pātikku pirāmāṇaṉuk
kuṭukka veṉākavum piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttilenākil Innila vilaippiramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭe piramāṇamāvatākavum Ivvūraṭaṅkalil Oṉṟu pāti Ivaṉukku tāṉātaṉa vikkirayaṅkaḷu
kku Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivu taRead tiṭṭuṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ kuṟukku mātuyarantittān kumarapālaṟku mallanciyaṉāṉa piramātarāyamuttaraiyaneṉ Ivvūril cempāti
nilam viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa piramātarāya muttaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aruḷicceyalpaṭi Innila vilaippiramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭeḻutineṉ Uṭaiyār Uṭaiyār tūmāmaṇi nāyaṉār koyil kaṇakku
kāṇi Uṭaiya kuṟiyāmaṅkalamuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟam[pa*la]muṭaiyāṉ Ūṟaiyāṇṭān nāṟpatteṇṇāyirappiriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Iṉiyapiḷḷai tūmāmaṇiyān tiruvampalanampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṭapāṭāvūruṭaiya curitimāṉ Ūr nampiyāṉ virametāvi periyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Irukaciruṭaiyāṉ periyaṉāṭṭu nampi Aṟivukkum Uṭaiyān Iḷaiyāṉaṟivukkum I
vvūruṭaiyāṉ Ariyāṉ maḻavarāyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṇṇanaṅka kāṟpperayan Aṟivukku pāṭāvūr koyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civapirāmaṇan Uṭaiyān civakavipaṭṭaṉ nampi Eḻuttu tok
kaikkuṉrāp peraiyaṉ cayiñaāṉa taṉmaikku Ivai paḻuvūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyār tūmāmaṇiṉāyaṉār koyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya pāracivan maṇiyan kaimmāṭṭāmaiyil Ivai kārikuṭai
yān Eḻuttu Itu teṉpāṭāvūruṭaiya curitimāṉvāḻavantā ṉāyaṉāya cempiyaṉ paraiyan cayiñāṉamaikku paḻuvūruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Itu caṉṉacittirakūṭamuttaraiyaṉ cayiñānamaikku Ivai pākkamuṭai
yān pañcanetivāṇaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven teṉkarai pāṇṭi kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Eyiṉāṭṭu kiḷimaṅkalamuṭaiyān pulvāvaiyil kāṇi Uṭaiya tiruvampalampiriyātāṉ kūttaṉāṉa neṟiyuṭaic
coḻamuventaveḷāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven pākkamuṭaiya vaṭukan tiruvaiyyāṟuṭaiyaāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivukku nakkanpāṭi Uṭaiyān Iḷaiyānmallan cayiñānamaikku vākuṭaiyāṉ maḻa
varāyaneḻuttu Itu nakkanpāṭi Uṭaiyān tevan viran cayiñāṉamaikku Ivai coḻamātevi Uṭaiyān ciṅkaperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Uṭaiyār tūmāmaṇiṉāyaṉār koyili taccācāri
yam periyan vaṭukanpiramātārāya Ācāriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ūṟṟattūr kāṇiuṭaiya munnūṟṟuvakkollan Eḻuttu Ivai Ūṟṟattūr kāṇiuṭaiya taccanmaṇiyan cantaṉāna Ūṟai
ṉāyaka taccan cayiñānamaikku Ippaṭikku Ivai Ūran maṇiyaṉāna Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu taṭṭān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivukku malaikkalakki viraṉ cayiñānamaikku Ivai vākuṭaiyān maḻavarā
ttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kumarantai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Ūṟai nāyakaṉāṉa virutarācappayaṅkarappallavarayaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.495 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
